code:
import io
import string

fn abs_val(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut best_val = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  mut found = false

  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end

    let val = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    let a = abs_val(val)

    if not found
      best_val = val
      best_abs = a
      found = true
    else if a < best_abs
      best_val = val
      best_abs = a
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  print("min_abs=#{best_val}")
  Ok(())
end
